description: Worst proposed node ever. Or rather: not worst, just structurally identical to the wave-35 Ajani case and Edgelord is not in the business of overcorrecting just because Wizards put the guy on a couple of Iconic Masters covers. Gideon Jura at 1 depicted anchor (Gideon's Reproach — golden energy sural lasso, ip_confidence: med) plus 1 flavor-speaker (Smite the Monstrous — Gideon watching kor in battle, depicted figure is a kor warrior, not Gideon). The Ajani precedent is unambiguous: 1 depiction + N flavor-speakers does not clear. The Chandra precedent (wave 38) is the threshold: 3 depictions. Yes, Gideon is a major planeswalker. Yes, he died in WAR. Yes, future Gideon prints are probable. None of that changes the threshold. Threshold is the threshold. I refuse. Triage with trigger condition matching the wave-35 Ajani entry.
citations: [wave-35 E1 Edgelord pass: Ajani precedent — 1 depicted anchor + 2 flavor-speakers → deferred]
[Scryfall: Gideon's Reproach BFZ-30, suspected_ip: Gideon Jura]
files_modified: reports/janitor_triage.md (Gideon entry appended to future-node candidates)
edgelord_note: Refusal-with-receipts is first-class output per the museum-curation framing. The graph improves because of the refusal, not despite it.
